steps.title: Use the future-time signal
steps.content: The phrase in a later chapter places the learning after the present point in the text. The verb must therefore express future time.

steps.title: Reject nonfuture tenses
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B describe past actions, and Choice D describes an action connected to the present. None match the future signal. The future-tense form fits the sentence's meaning. The answer is C.
